summary.what: Fix stale anchor detection via reachability check
summary.why: After rebase, old SHAs exist in object store but aren't in HEAD's history — git log succeeds with phantom results
summary.how: Added git merge-base --is-ancestor check before git log in GetPendingCommits; added IsAncestorOf to GitOps interface

notes: User report from Noam: after git pull --rebase, timbers showed pending commits that were already documented on a feature branch. Root cause: stale anchor detection only fired when SHA was completely absent from object store. After rebase, old objects linger for 2 weeks. The reachability check catches this immediately.
